title: Obione densifolia
taxonomy: Obione densifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is native to South America. The plant is part of the genus Obione, which is a group of succulent plants. Obione densifolia is closely related to other species in the genus and is often found in dry, rocky areas. Further classification may include the plant's specific rank within the Amaranthaceae family.
